title: Simple Ancient Armor
description: This mod brings a new set of Ancient Armor and a companion Ancient Sword to Minecraft. The armor is designed such that it's new but still feels like it's part of the game, giving you a good alternative option in addition to the vanilla sets.
body:
Engage in combat with the strength of the ancients! This mod presents you with an entirely new set of Ancient Armor and a very potent Ancient Sword. The armor gives you decent protection and a fresh look, and the sword provides that little something extra for your fighting skills.

This mod is meant to be light and straightforward — simply new gear, nothing fancy. It's perfect for survival players who want more variation of equipment without changing the standard Minecraft experience.

I highly recomend using "Just Enogh Items" because the crafts can get pretty confusing

CurseForge Page: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-ancient-armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-ancient-armor)
